title: rubus cyri
intro: Rubus cyri, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus cyri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus cyri include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
